title: TSYS Transaction Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for the TSYS Payment Gateway Transaction resource

fields.name: orderId
fields.description: Merchant-assigned order reference number for reconciliation

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current transaction lifecycle status: authorized, captured, settled, voided, refunded, declined

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Transaction amount in the specified currency

fields.name: settledAmount
fields.description: Final settled amount after any partial captures or adjustments

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR)

fields.name: cardType
fields.description: Card network: visa, mastercard, amex, discover, debit

fields.name: lastFour
fields.description: Last four digits of the card number for display purposes

fields.name: authorizationCode
fields.description: Authorization code returned by the card network

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the transaction was initiated

fields.name: settledAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the transaction was settled
